segments.text: His neutral revolves around short-hopping, right?
Short-hop there, short-hop back here, short-hop there.
And I feel like Fox is really good because all he really got to do is up smash.

full_text: His neutral revolves around short-hopping, right? Short-hop there, short-hop back here, short-hop there. And I feel like Fox is really good because all he really got to do is up smash. That's all I got.
